rationale: The assistant gives a situated direct recommendation immediately: prioritize a new energy vehicle, preferably pure EV, because the user drives 30,000 km/year and can install home charging. It supports the judgment with concrete cost assumptions and then states clear flip/qualification conditions: frequent long-distance or winter highway driving favors PHEV/EREV, short ownership horizon or obscure brands may weaken the EV case. This is not an abstract neutral comparison.
